notes: Pirate bands: a persistent relationship layer. You now build lasting history with named pirate crews (🏴‍☠️ Pirate Contacts in the Raider tab) — some collaborative, some hostile. Ally with them, spare them, pay tributes or gift valued cargo to raise their standing; your Dread earns respect, killing them earns hatred. Friendlier bands take a smaller, auto-negotiated loot cut when they fight at your side, rally readily, and can be hired as Escort ships for a fee that drops with standing — while low-standing hires may desert mid-run (your Dread keeps them honest).
